status.title: Conditions improving
status.message: Recent weather suggests soil is warming, but frost risk remains.

metrics.label: Precipitation (past 7 days)
metrics.interpretation: Recent precipitation contributes to near‑surface soil moisture in many locations.

metrics.label: 5‑day average air temperature
metrics.interpretation: Temperatures in this range are associated with increasing soil thaw and liquid water availability.

metrics.label: Near‑surface soil water state
metrics.interpretation: Conditions suggest soils are transitioning from frozen to thawed, with increasing availability of liquid water.

notes: Air temperature trends are used as a proxy for soil thaw and water availability, not as a direct measure of soil temperature.
Soil moisture and thaw can vary locally due to soil type, drainage, snow cover, and microclimate.
